rationale: Both reviews surface exactly the same three material api-design defects (tautological curvature theorem at line 17/19, vacuous IsCompactOrientedManifold.oriented : True at line 24/26, and direct duplicate of banach_steinhaus at line 36/37) that are confirmed verbatim in the diff; acting on either produces the identical outcome of removal or replacement with actual Mathlib structures, with no other distinction for this rubric.
